description: Amaco — local-first autonomous multi-agent completion orchestrator. Runs your local agent CLIs through plan → architect → implement → validate → review → fix → verify in isolated git worktrees.

commands.name: init
commands.description: Initialize Amaco in the current project (.amaco/ scaffold).

options.description: overwrite existing config files (runs are preserved)
non-interactive: use safe detected defaults, never wait for input
force the flowd wizard even when --yes would default to non-interactive

commands.name: setup
commands.description: Flowd wizard for provider, validation commands, and run defaults.

commands.name: provider
commands.description: Inspect, configure, and test local coding-CLI providers.

subcommands.name: detect
subcommands.description: Scan PATH for known local coding CLIs (claude/codex/opencode/aider/ollama).

options.description: emit JSON

subcommands.name: list
subcommands.description: Show providers configured in this project.

options.description: emit JSON

subcommands.name: test
subcommands.description: Send a tiny no-op prompt to a configured provider and look for the magic token.

options.description: skip confirmation prompt (non-interactive)

subcommands.name: set
subcommands.description: Assign every default agent to use the given provider.

options.description: skip confirmation prompts when adding a detected provider

subcommands.name: setup
subcommands.description: Flowd provider setup wizard.

commands.name: config
commands.description: Show and edit .amaco/project.yml without hand-editing YAML.

subcommands.name: show
subcommands.description: Print the current config and validate it.

options.description: emit parsed JSON instead of YAML

subcommands.name: get
subcommands.description: Print a single config value (dot-path, e.g. commands.validate).

options.description: emit JSON

subcommands.name: set
subcommands.description: Set a config value. Booleans/numbers/strings parsed automatically; arrays/objects via JSON (e.g. 'amaco config set commands.validate "[\"pnpm test\"]"').

subcommands.name: validate
subcommands.description: Validate the project.yml file against the Amaco schema.

options.description: emit JSON

commands.name: skills
commands.description: List, inspect, and assign skills (.amaco/skills and .claude/skills).

subcommands.name: list
subcommands.description: Show every discovered skill and which agents use it.

options.description: emit JSON

subcommands.name: show
subcommands.description: Print a skill's full SKILL.md body.

subcommands.name: assign
subcommands.description: Attach a skill to an agent (writes to .amaco/project.yml).

subcommands.name: unassign
subcommands.description: Remove a skill from an agent.

commands.name: flows
commands.description: List and inspect Flow run recipes from built-ins and .amaco/flows.

subcommands.name: list
subcommands.description: Show every discovered Flow.

options.description: emit JSON

subcommands.name: show
subcommands.description: Print a Flow's participant slots and ordered steps.

options.description: emit JSON

subcommands.name: suggest
subcommands.description: Suggest a Flow from task risk signals and local Flow outcomes.

options.description: known touched file path; repeat for more
task risk level: low, medium, or high
emit JSON

subcommands.name: export-arbitration
subcommands.description: Export a Quality Arbitration run as local JSON evidence for later evaluation.

options.description: write the JSON export to a local file

commands.name: approvals
commands.description: Inspect and resolve human-approval requests for a paused run.

subcommands.name: list
subcommands.description: Show all approval requests for a run.

options.description: emit JSON

subcommands.name: show
subcommands.description: Show a single approval request in detail.

options.description: emit JSON

subcommands.name: approve
subcommands.description: Approve a pending approval. Resumes the run if it is waiting.

options.description: decision note recorded in approvals.json

subcommands.name: reject
subcommands.description: Reject a pending approval. The run will be marked `blocked`.

options.description: decision note recorded in approvals.json

commands.name: roadmap
commands.description: Manage local roadmap items (.amaco/roadmap/roadmap.json).

subcommands.name: init
subcommands.description: Create the .amaco/roadmap/ scaffold if missing.

subcommands.name: add
subcommands.description: Add a roadmap item.

options.description: longer description
low | medium | high
emit JSON

subcommands.name: list
subcommands.description: List roadmap items.

options.description: emit JSON

subcommands.name: show
subcommands.description: Show a single roadmap item.

options.description: emit JSON

subcommands.name: update
subcommands.description: Update a roadmap item.

subcommands.name: archive
subcommands.description: Archive a roadmap item (keeps history).

subcommands.name: proposals
subcommands.description: List roadmap proposals stored in .amaco/roadmap/proposals/.

options.description: emit JSON

subcommands.name: proposal
subcommands.description: Inspect, parse, and accept individual proposals.

subcommands.name: show
subcommands.description: Print a proposal's raw Markdown body.

subcommands.name: parse
subcommands.description: Parse a proposal and print the typed preview.

options.description: emit JSON

subcommands.name: accept
subcommands.description: Accept a parsed proposal (creates roadmap items + tasks atomically).

options.description: preview without writing
skip DEPENDS_ON entries that point at unknown task titles instead of failing
emit JSON

subcommands.name: plan
subcommands.description: Run the configured local planner provider on a broad goal and save the output as a proposal draft.

options.description: explicit proposal id; default is timestamp + slug
override the provider id (default: planner agent's provider)

commands.name: tasks
commands.description: Manage local tasks: backlog → queued → running → done.

subcommands.name: add
subcommands.description: Create a task.

options.description: low | medium | high
link to a roadmap item id
comma-separated skill names
comma-separated likely-touched files
effort bucket (low|medium|high). Maps to a provider via project.yml#effortMap.
override the provider for runs spawned from this task (wins over --effort).
investigation-only: runs spawned from this task skip executor + fix loop and refuse apply/validate/revert.
apply the heuristic effort suggestion when --effort isn't passed.
emit JSON

subcommands.name: list
subcommands.description: List tasks.

options.description: filter by status
emit JSON

subcommands.name: show
subcommands.description: Show a task with comments and run history.

options.description: emit JSON

subcommands.name: comment
subcommands.description: Add a comment to a task.

subcommands.name: ready
subcommands.description: Mark a task ready to run.

subcommands.name: cancel
subcommands.description: Cancel a task.

subcommands.name: queue
subcommands.description: Add a task to the scheduler queue.

subcommands.name: run
subcommands.description: Run this task now (foreground; same as amaco run --task <id>).

subcommands.name: report
subcommands.description: Generate a Markdown task report at .amaco/roadmap/tasks/<id>-report.md.

commands.name: queue
commands.description: Manage the local task scheduler queue.

subcommands.name: list
subcommands.description: Show the queue and running tasks.

options.description: emit JSON

subcommands.name: add
subcommands.description: Add a task to the queue.

options.description: origin label for fairness / per-source quotas (default: user)

subcommands.name: remove
subcommands.description: Remove a task from the queue.

subcommands.name: run
subcommands.description: Start the local scheduler loop and process queued tasks.

options.description: exit once the queue is empty (useful in scripts)

subcommands.name: pause
subcommands.description: Pause the scheduler (new tasks will not start).

subcommands.name: resume
subcommands.description: Resume the scheduler.

subcommands.name: status
subcommands.description: Print scheduler state and recent conflict warnings.

options.description: emit JSON

commands.name: logs
commands.description: Show the captured provider stdout/stderr stream for a run (the model's live CLI output).

options.description: tail the stream live (like `tail -f`); Ctrl+C to stop
specific agent stream to read (default: newest)

commands.name: notifications
commands.description: Inspect and manage local Amaco notifications.

subcommands.name: list
subcommands.description: Show notifications.

options.description: only show unread
only show items that need action
emit JSON

subcommands.name: read
subcommands.description: Mark a notification read.

subcommands.name: resolve
subcommands.description: Mark a notification resolved.

subcommands.name: read-all
subcommands.description: Mark every unread notification as read.

subcommands.name: settings
subcommands.description: Show current notification settings and configured gateways.

subcommands.name: test
subcommands.description: Send a tiny test notification through a configured gateway.

commands.name: gateways
commands.description: Inspect and toggle notification delivery gateways.

subcommands.name: list
subcommands.description: Show available gateways and their enabled/valid status.

options.description: emit JSON

subcommands.name: test
subcommands.description: Send a test message through a gateway (no real notification persisted).

subcommands.name: enable
subcommands.description: Enable a configured gateway.

subcommands.name: disable
subcommands.description: Disable a gateway. Existing config is preserved.

commands.name: editor
commands.description: Configure and test the local editor handoff used by the dashboard.

subcommands.name: detect
subcommands.description: Probe known editors (code, code-insiders, cursor) for availability.

subcommands.name: set
subcommands.description: Enable editor handoff and store the command (default args use --goto path:line:column).

options.description: override the default args (use {file}/{line}/{column} placeholders)

subcommands.name: test
subcommands.description: Open a file (default: README.md) using the configured editor command.

options.description: line number

commands.name: suggestions
commands.description: Inspect and act on review suggestions captured for a run.

subcommands.name: list
subcommands.description: List every suggestion attached to a run.

options.description: emit JSON instead of a human-readable table

subcommands.name: show
subcommands.description: Show one suggestion in detail (including any proposed patch).

subcommands.name: approve
subcommands.description: Approve a suggestion (creates and resolves an approval record).

options.description: decision note recorded with the approval

subcommands.name: reject
subcommands.description: Reject a suggestion. Records a rejection in approvals.json.

options.description: decision note recorded with the approval

subcommands.name: apply
subcommands.description: Apply an approved suggestion's proposedPatch inside the run's worktree (git apply, never push/merge).

options.description: after applying, run commands.validate inside the worktree
if validation fails, revert the patch (only valid with --validate)
validation profile to run after apply (only meaningful with --validate)

subcommands.name: validate
subcommands.description: Run the project's commands.validate inside the run's worktree against an applied suggestion.

options.description: named validation profile from commands.validationProfiles

subcommands.name: revert
subcommands.description: Revert a previously-applied suggestion using the captured patch (git apply -R).

subcommands.name: profile
subcommands.description: Read or edit a suggestion's validation profile metadata.

subcommands.name: show
subcommands.description: Print the suggestion's current validation profile (if any).

subcommands.name: set
subcommands.description: Set the suggestion's validation profile. Future validation runs use this profile. Does NOT re-run validation.

subcommands.name: clear
subcommands.description: Clear the suggestion's validation profile back to default (commands.validate).

commands.name: bundles
commands.description: Group reviewed suggestions into a review pass that applies, validates, and reverts as a unit.

subcommands.name: list
subcommands.description: List every bundle (review pass) attached to a run.

options.description: emit JSON

subcommands.name: create
subcommands.description: Create a new review pass (bundle) for a run.

options.description: human-readable title
optional longer description
initial suggestion ids to include (must belong to this run)

subcommands.name: add
subcommands.description: Add a suggestion to a draft bundle.

subcommands.name: remove
subcommands.description: Remove a suggestion from a draft bundle.

subcommands.name: approve
subcommands.description: Approve a review pass (gate before apply).

options.description: decision note

subcommands.name: reject
subcommands.description: Reject a review pass.

options.description: decision note

subcommands.name: apply
subcommands.description: Apply every suggestion in the review pass to the run worktree (all-or-nothing with rollback).

options.description: after applying, run commands.validate
if validation fails, revert the bundle (only valid with --validate)
validation profile to run after apply (only meaningful with --validate)

subcommands.name: smart-apply
subcommands.description: Apply suggestions one-by-one in order. Earlier successes stay applied if a later step fails.

options.description: validate after each step; stop at the first failing validation
when --stop-on-validation-fail is set, revert ONLY the failing step (prior steps stay applied)
force every step to use this named validation profile
let each step use its own VALIDATION_PROFILE (falls back to bundle/default)

subcommands.name: validate
subcommands.description: Run commands.validate against the run worktree, attached to a bundle.

options.description: named validation profile from commands.validationProfiles

subcommands.name: revert
subcommands.description: Revert every suggestion in the review pass via git apply -R (worktree only).

subcommands.name: preflight
subcommands.description: Run a static-only preflight without modifying the worktree.

subcommands.name: profile
subcommands.description: Read or edit a review pass's validation profile metadata.

subcommands.name: show
subcommands.description: Print the bundle's current validation profile (if any).

subcommands.name: set
subcommands.description: Set the bundle's validation profile. Future validation runs use this profile. Does NOT re-run validation.

subcommands.name: clear
subcommands.description: Clear the bundle's validation profile back to default (commands.validate).

commands.name: validation
commands.description: Inspect validation profiles configured under commands.validationProfiles.

subcommands.name: profiles
subcommands.description: List the implicit default + every named validation profile.

options.description: emit JSON

subcommands.name: usage
subcommands.description: Show how often each validation profile has actually run (`commands.validate` use counts as 'default').

options.description: emit JSON

subcommands.name: profile
subcommands.description: Inspect, manage, and migrate validation profile references.

subcommands.name: show
subcommands.description: Show the resolved commands for a named profile (or 'default').

options.description: emit JSON

subcommands.name: migrate
subcommands.description: Rewrite suggestion and bundle records that reference <fromProfile> to point at <toProfile>. Use --clear to migrate to the default profile.

options.description: preview affected records; write nothing
interpret <toProfile> as a placeholder for clear-to-default
scan every run instead of the recent 50
limit to a single run

subcommands.name: clear-references
subcommands.description: Clear every suggestion/bundle that references <profileName> back to the default profile.

options.description: preview affected records; write nothing
scan every run instead of the recent 50
limit to a single run

subcommands.name: rename
subcommands.description: Rename a validation profile in project.yml AND migrate every suggestion/bundle reference in one atomic operation. Preserves the profile's description and commands. Refuses if <toProfile> already exists.

options.description: preview the project.yml rename + affected references; write nothing
scan every run instead of the recent 50
limit the reference scan to a single run

subcommands.name: doctor
subcommands.description: Audit every suggestion + bundle for stale validation-profile references. Default scope matches `amaco doctor` (recent 50 runs); use --all to lift the cap.

options.description: scan every run instead of the recent 50
limit the audit to a single run
emit JSON (machine-readable; includes didYouMean per record)

subcommands.name: migrations
subcommands.description: List previously-applied profile migrations.

options.description: emit JSON

commands.name: terminal
commands.description: Inspect and close dashboard terminal sessions. Sessions are user-launched from the dashboard; this CLI never spawns one.

subcommands.name: list
subcommands.description: List every terminal session ever opened in this project (live + closed).

options.description: emit JSON

subcommands.name: close
subcommands.description: Mark a terminal session as closed. Only affects live sessions in the running dashboard process; closed sessions are already terminal.

commands.name: policies
commands.description: Inspect user policy rules in .amaco/policies/. Rules can refuse a suggestion/bundle apply; they never permit a patch that built-in safety already refused.

subcommands.name: list
subcommands.description: List every rule loaded from .amaco/policies/*.yml (after schema + regex/glob validation).

options.description: emit JSON

subcommands.name: check
subcommands.description: Apply the loaded policy rules to a patch file (unified diff). Read-only — never applies, never executes.

options.description: which apply surface to simulate (suggestion-apply | bundle-apply)
emit JSON

subcommands.name: doctor
subcommands.description: Validate rule YAML, list malformed files, surface duplicate ids and empty-rule files.

options.description: emit JSON

commands.name: budget
commands.description: View or configure the daily spend cap (and what happens when it's hit).

subcommands.name: show
subcommands.description: Show the configured cap, action, and today's spend so far.

subcommands.name: set
subcommands.description: Set the daily spend cap and/or the action taken when it's reached.

options.description: daily cap in USD (e.g. 5)
what to do at the cap: stop | downgrade-model | reduce-effort
warn threshold as a fraction 0..1 (default 0.8)
cheaper provider to switch to on downgrade-model

subcommands.name: off
subcommands.description: Remove the daily spend cap.

commands.name: replay
commands.description: Read-only inspector for a persisted run (mirrors the Replay tab in the dashboard).

arguments.description: id of the run to replay

options.description: emit the full replay projection as JSON

commands.name: pause
commands.description: Request that an active run pause at the next stage boundary.

arguments.description: id of the run to pause

commands.name: resume
commands.description: Clear a pending pause request or resume a paused run.

arguments.description: id of the run to resume

commands.name: shell
commands.description: Interactive terminal panel. For the full dashboard + scheduler + browser in one shot, use `amaco ui` instead.

options.description: snapshot refresh interval in ms (default 1000)
print one snapshot as JSON and exit (useful for scripts / smoke tests)

commands.name: run
commands.description: Run the default plan→architect→implement→review→verify workflow.

options.description: start the local supervisor dashboard alongside the run
port for the supervisor dashboard (default 4317)
link this run to a roadmap task; updates task status and runIds.
effort bucket (low|medium|high). Maps to a provider via project.yml#effortMap.
override the provider for every agent in this run (wins over --effort).
investigation-only run: skip executor + fix loop; refuse apply/validate/revert; force readOnly permissions on every agent.
apply the heuristic effort suggestion when --effort isn't passed.
comma-separated skill ids to attach to every agent for this single run (merged with each agent's configured skills).
ask agents to produce token-efficient output (prefer diffs, bullets, no preamble).
resolve and run a Flow recipe for this run.
override a Flow participant slot provider. Repeat for multiple slots.
extra brief for the Flow task packet.
Flow context policy (balanced|compact|artifact-heavy).
skip an optional Flow step for this run. Repeat for multiple steps.
open terminal Flow setup for task, brief, participants, and optional steps. Requires --flow.
rewind: fork from a prior run, reusing its plan (+ architecture) instead of regenerating them.
stage to resume at with --resume-from: planning | architecting (reuse plan) | executing (reuse plan + architecture). Default: executing.

commands.name: ui
commands.description: Start the local supervisor dashboard for this project.

options.description: port to bind (default 4317)
don't open the dashboard in your default browser on startup (default: open).
don't start the managed scheduler subprocess (default: on; the UI owns its lifecycle).

commands.name: status
commands.description: List Amaco runs in this project.

options.description: emit JSON instead of a human-readable table

commands.name: abort
commands.description: Mark a run as aborted (does not delete the worktree).

commands.name: doctor
commands.description: Check environment, config, providers, and recommend next steps.

options.description: emit JSON
apply safe fixes (create missing dirs/templates, add Claude provider if detected, suggest validation)
